scripts.dev: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev public --do CONTACT_RATE_LIMITER=ContactRateLimiter@brishav-contact-rate-limiter
scripts.premerge: npm ci && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=brishav-portfolio --branch=feature/advanced-v1
